actionCalls.description: We use APEX to make the Callout.
actionCalls.name: Cancel_GT_Order
actionCalls.label: Cancel GT Order

value.stringValue: No Request Id Found on Lab Order, Cancellation did not happen
Cancel Lab Order Email was Sent

actionCalls.name: Log_Fault_Update_Lab_Order_Cancellation
actionCalls.label: Log - Fault - Update Lab Order - Cancellation

actionCalls.name: Log_Fault_Update_Lab_Order_Cancellation_Post_Email
actionCalls.label: Log - Fault - Update Lab Order - Cancellation Post Email

value.stringValue: Cancellation of Lab Order was Successful

actionCalls.name: Log_Lab_Order_Cancelled_Successfully_Post_Email
actionCalls.label: Log - Lab Order Cancelled Successfully Post Email

value.stringValue: Cancellation of Lab Order was Successful

assignments.description: Here is the values we set the updated values on the Lab Order
assignments.name: Set_Lab_Order_Values
assignments.label: Set Lab Order Values

assignments.description: Here is the values we set the updated values on the Lab Order
assignments.name: Set_Lab_Order_Values_Post_Email
assignments.label: Set Lab Order Values Post Email

decisions.description: Not all labs support cancelling orders, which we will give an error when this happens.
decisions.name: Does_Lab_Support_API_Cancellations
decisions.label: Does Lab Support API - Cancellations

decisions.description: Can't Cancel a Lab Order without a Request Id
decisions.name: Is_There_a_Request_Id
decisions.label: Is There a Request Id

decisions.description: We determine what the API has did and if we errored out navigate the user to the error message.
decisions.name: Was_API_Call_Successfull
decisions.label: Was API Call Successfull

Flow.description: This flow will allow end users to cancel lab orders
Flow.label: Screenflow - Lab Order - Cancel Order

recordUpdates.description: Here we update the Lab Order with the new status values
recordUpdates.name: Update_Lab_Order_Cancelled
recordUpdates.label: Update Lab Order - Cancelled

recordUpdates.description: Here we update the Lab Order with the new status values
recordUpdates.name: Update_Lab_Order_Cancelled_Post_Email
recordUpdates.label: Update Lab Order - Cancelled Post Email

fields.name: emailSuccessConfirmation
fields.fieldText: The Cancelation Email was sent out successfully to {!recordId.Opportunity__r.Lab_Provider__r.Lab__c}

fields.name: txt_CancellationEndpointNotSupported
fields.fieldText: {!recordId.Lab_Provider__c} doesn't support cancellation of the order after the order has already been submitted. If you would like to email the provider please check the box and an cancelation request email will be sent. If not checked, an email will not be sent to the provider.

screens.name: No_Request_Id_On_Lab_Order_Can_t_Cancel
screens.label: No Request Id On Lab Order - Can't Cancel

fields.name: txt_CantCancel_NoRequestId
fields.fieldText: There is no Request Id on this Lab Order, which means you can not cancel this Lab Order.

screens.description: We show the user a confirmation message that the order has been cancelled.
screens.name: Order_Cancelled
screens.label: Order Cancelled

screens.description: We give the end users the option to choose what status to set the Lab Order to.
screens.name: Set_Cancellation_Status
screens.label: Set Cancellation Status

screens.description: We give the end users the option to choose what status to set the Lab Order to.
screens.name: Set_Cancellation_Status_postEmail
screens.label: Set Cancellation Status

screens.description: If the API errored out we show them the error message.
screens.name: Show_API_Error
screens.label: Show API Error

textTemplates.name: cancelOrderEmailBody
textTemplates.text: We are requesting that this kit ID be cancelled. If this kit cannot be cancelled, please reply back and let us know.

transforms.description: Here we build out the API Request for Cancel Order
transforms.name: Map_Cancel_Request_Values
transforms.label: Map Cancel Request Values
